text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime. I head to a diner that's having an
all-you-can-eat special. There, I see...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Inari, stop! Stop! You gotta think carefully 'bout
what to eat first!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya mean? I'm going to start with Inari
sushi since it's my favorite, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Soaked in broth until it's soft and juicy—the pride
and joy of Edo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You can like it all ya want, but this is a buffet,
yeah? You gotta get your money's worth!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Here's my winning strategy. Beef, pork, chicken!
Beef, pork, chicken! Throw the curry on the
ground! Okay, now you try.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Beef, pork, chicken! Beef, pork, chicken! Throw
the curry out the window!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ehhh, a little off but ya got the idea. Now, first up
is beef.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hold up, Tama. Your way of life is all messed up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya need to live life to the fullest. Who cares
about the price? Eat what ya wanna eat, that's
the Edo way.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're so small-minded! Just like your body!
Wahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're da last person I wanna hear da word
"small" from!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Can I... can I really do that though? Just eat
whatever I want without worryin' 'bout the bill?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You bet your tail you can! Stop gettin' bogged
down by all these rules!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We're small enough as it is. If we stay
small-minded too, we'll never be able to win
against the big dogs!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Is that how it works? I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But you might be on to somethin'. Guess I've been
holdin' myself back without even realizing it. In
that case...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice, Inari! I'mma show you my
true self here at this buffet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Look at this haul! Now this is what I really wanted to eat!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think? Jelly, cake, pudding, and fruit!
Four layers of dessert!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Uh, what? I'm glad you're lettin' loose a bit, but...
only desserts?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it! I grew up poor, so I never got to
eat any of this stuff when I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I guess sometimes it's better to stop
countin' pennies and just live a little!
